title: An Act to Expand Tax Incentives for Certain Barn Renovations
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, May 28, 2025
last_house_action: 5/1/2025 - Received by the Clerk of the House on May 1, 2025. The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on TAXATION pursuant to Joint Rule 308.2 and ordered printed pursuant to Joint Rule 401.
